decision.summary: Both the weekly and daily BTC slots are already filled, so there is no clean new edge to add.
decision.rationale: Beecthor's latest view is still to treat the 78k-79k sweep as a corrective exhaustion zone and to watch for shorts rather than add fresh longs. The current portfolio already has the weekly BTC 80k reach position open and the daily BTC 76k dip position open, so both allowed BTC price-hit slots are occupied. Neither open position is near take-profit yet, and there is no floor setup in context, so the correct action is to hold and avoid adding exposure.
